description_long: This is a small, two-story apartment building with a flat, concrete roof and a blue-painted facade. The front features a single entrance door with a blue awning above it, flanked by two windows on the ground floor and two more on the upper floor, all with white frames. The side and rear facades are similarly painted blue, with regularly spaced windows that are symmetrically aligned both vertically and horizontally. The building sits flush with the ground, with a narrow sidewalk or curb visible at its base. The windows are rectangular and evenly distributed, and there are no balconies or decorative architectural elements. The overall appearance is simple and functional, typical of modest urban residential structures.
description: A compact, blue-painted two-story apartment building with a flat concrete roof, symmetrical windows, and a single front entrance with a blue awning.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a blue awning, two ground-floor windows, and two upper-floor windows.
description_view_1: The left side view displays four symmetrically arranged windows on each floor, with no entrance or awning visible.
description_view_2: The rear view features two upper and two lower windows, similar to the front but without a door or awning.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with four windows per floor and no entrance or awning.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical pairs on each facade, evenly spaced and aligned horizontally and vertically across both floors.
